'''[[Diva]] Arroquitas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Theelin/Legends|Theelin]] who was the master of ceremonies in the Priole Danna Festival on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lamuir IV]] just one year before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began. However the festival was canceled due to the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].
